creator: dan.kotowski@a9development.com
text:
at commit 0a370357329c2bbda27e2f70a4398a0092ea7aa4 distinfo is incorrect:

$ fetch http://distcache.FreeBSD.org/ports-distfiles/libsignal-node-0.21.1-yarn-cache.tar.gz
libsignal-node-0.21.1-yarn-cache.tar.gz                 64 MB 1681 kBps    40s

$ ls -l libsignal-node-0.21.1-yarn-cache.tar.gz
-rw-r--r--  1 root  wheel  67924654 Dec 16 07:58 libsignal-node-0.21.1-yarn-cache.tar.gz

$ shasum -a256 libsignal-node-0.21.1-yarn-cache.tar.gz
9605939694c95debbacb7015e3d6a54d0618b39c9d5346f1525dc808f240a586  libsignal-node-0.21.1-yarn-cache.tar.gz

$ grep libsignal-node-0.21.1-yarn-cache.tar.gz /usr/ports/net-im/libsignal-node/distinfo
SHA256 (libsignal-node-0.21.1-yarn-cache.tar.gz) = 5888ccb3a4de59b34b1dce1bd34c0d2d19a34424a9e35adb8b624e19aec9d125
SIZE (libsignal-node-0.21.1-yarn-cache.tar.gz) = 21537796
